title: Assistant Engineer #51873
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Logistic Service Provider
  • Position Title: Assistant Engineer
  • Working Location: West - Jurong Island (Company Transportation Provided, Islandwide)
  • Working Hours: 4 days, 12 hours Rotating Shift (2-day shifts + 2-night shifts)
  • Salary Package: Up to SGD 4500 + Allowances (Rotating Shift + Meal) + Incentives (Attendance + Retention) + AWS + Performance Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct preventive and corrective maintenance on packaging/conveying equipment, facilities, and electrical systems on Material Handling Equipment, along with other assigned tasks
  • Perform mechanical preventive maintenance on packaging equipment and facilities, and handle additional duties as assigned
  • Diagnose and resolve faults in electrical, mechanical, pneumatic, and hydraulic systems on various equipment
  • Respond promptly to equipment breakdowns, ensuring quick recovery to operational status
  • Utilize Predictive Maintenance to analyze and minimize equipment downtime
  • Effectively use CMMS to investigate part failures
  • Organize and execute planned shutdown maintenance
  • Lead a team of maintenance technicians and coordinate with vendors for fabrication work
  • Manage the inventory of critical spare parts for equipment
  • Oversee and document the commissioning of new equipment
  • Record maintenance activities on works orders, and provide daily updates to superiors
  • Generate and prepare reports for management presentations
  • Procure parts from service vendors as necessary
  • Assess risks and hazards associated with maintenance jobs
  • Guide the team in Root Cause Analysis and collaborate with the Operational Team on Failure Analysis
  • Lead projects aimed at continuous improvement and operational excellence
  • Mentor and provide technical guidance to new technicians

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Min. Diploma in Electrical & Electronic Engineering or Mechatronics Engineering
  • Min. 2 years of relevant experience in automation systems
  • Possesses a basic understanding of AC drives, electrical motors, pneumatic cylinders, and roller/chain conveyors
  • Capable of utilizing, debugging, and modifying existing PLC programs, with knowledge of PLC and electrical systems
  • Proficient in reading and using Electrical Single Line Diagrams
  • Skilled in working with low voltage distribution boards for lighting and auxiliary equipment.
  • Willing to undertake 12-hour rotating shifts and be available for standby duties as needed

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #51873 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
